description: Product Description Achieve a deeper & more effective clean with this superfood facial scrub from beauty formulas. Taking inspiration from traditional herbal remedies, it's enriched with ginger & turmeric & works to leave skin feeling renewed and refreshed. Achieve a deeper & more effective clean with this superfood facial scrub from beauty formulas. Taking inspiration from traditional herbal remedies, it's enriched with ginger & turmeric & works to leave skin feeling renewed and refreshed. Ingredients Ginger, turmeric. Directions [A1] Apply a small amount to damp skin in a circular motion, then rinse off with water. Safety Warning For external use only; patch test before use; discontinue if irritation occurs; keep out of reach of children; avoid ingestion; store in a cool, dry place; do not use on broken skin; use within expiry date; avoid sharing; flammable if applicable.
